response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications for this role, including native-level Japanese proficiency, C programming for UNIX/Linux kernel development, and direct experience with embedded networking or security features. While the resume demonstrates strong general software engineering skills across multiple languages and domains, it does not align with the specific technical and linguistic requirements of this mid-senior embedded security engineering position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages (C, C++, Python, JavaScript, D, etc.)
Proven ability to work in collaborative, technical, and cross-functional teams
Demonstrated expertise in optimization, testing, and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: No evidence of C programming for UNIX/Linux kernel development or source-code modification
No native-level Japanese proficiency or explicit mention of Japanese language skills
Limited exposure to embedded systems, networking, or security technologies relevant to the role
